name: Eyes On Inc Which Will Do Bus
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found for any carrier named 'Eyes On' (searched safer.fmcsa.dot.gov keyword search — no records). The name 'Eyes On Inc Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a truncated CA Secretary of State legal name (CA articles of incorporation commonly include the phrase 'which will do business as...'). An entity 'Eyes On, Inc.' is registered in CA at 1270 Park Hill Lane, Escondido, CA 92025 doing business as Nancy Pasquan & Associates — a consulting/IT firm, not a bus operator. Likely a false positive in the source list; no transportation operator found at this address.

name: Cross Country Transportation

Operating Authority shows NOT AUTHORIZED for for-hire interstate — consistent with intrastate passenger ops. Safety rating not assigned. 2 inspections / 0 OOS / 1 tow-away crash in 24 mo.
